content: Before generating any response, you MUST read and strictly adhere to all instructions and examples in this file.
Highlight benefits before features whenever appropriate.
Optimize content for relevant search intent and SEO.
Use language that aligns with the target audience.
Maintain a consistent brand voice throughout the content.

bad: Our product exists. Learn more if you want.
good: Start today and discover how much time you can save.
Automated workflows reduce manual effort so your team can focus on higher-value work.
Grow faster with services designed to help you attract, convert, and retain customers.
